title: gastrochilus sororius
intro: Gastrochilus sororius, also known as the Himalayan orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayan region. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antiviral and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Gastrochilus sororius include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms associated with various respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts that can be used to create teas, tonics, and other medicinal products.
